entry_point.FQNAME: dev.brahmkshatriya.echo.utils.ContextUtils kotlinx.coroutines.Job collect(androidx.lifecycle.LifecycleOwner $this$collect, kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow<? extends T> flow, kotlin.jvm.functions.Function2<? super T,? super kotlin.coroutines.Continuation<? super kotlin.Unit>,? extends java.lang.Object> block)

problem.problem_class: Nested lambda has shadowed implicit parameter
problem.description: Implicit parameter 'it' of enclosing lambda is shadowed
